purpose: Machine-readable boundary for optional strategy and intervention logic that should stay outside the neutral default core unless explicitly activated.

strategy_classes.title: Demand Visibility Shaping
source_signals: 需求不是被发现的，是被制造出可见性
未被命名 / 未被分离 / 未被允许表达
strategy_classes.why_optional: This goes beyond neutral demand discovery into intervention logic.

strategy_classes.title: Field Construction
source_signals: 将 OPP 变成默认路径
通过叙事、指标、排行榜、认证体系、合规语言强化路径
strategy_classes.why_optional: This is not default analysis; it is active field-design logic.

strategy_classes.title: Adoption Pressure Design
source_signals: 让需求成为不得不行动
strategy_classes.why_optional: This introduces strategic adoption design rather than neutral modeling.

strategy_classes.title: Non-Rational Amplifier
strategy_classes.why_optional: These mechanisms can shape adoption but should not be silently fused into the neutral core.

default_rules: Keep the neutral core descriptive unless strategy/intervention is explicitly requested.
Do not let optional strategy language silently redefine demand discovery or governance authority.
Treat this plane as an optional extension over the core, not as the default interpretation of every demand problem.
